backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Jackman town website backend, implementing user profile management, event/announcement CRUD, contact form submission, and resident problem report submission/retrieval with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features with IDs, titles, affected files, component dependencies, and test IDs—covering the TownOfficeDashboardPage creation, its route registration, and navigation/footer link additions.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of all frontend source files to short summaries, serving as a reference document describing the purpose and key contents of each frontend file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Jackman Maine Town Website SPA, mounting the React app at `#root` and loading the Vite entry point `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that configures TanStack Router with all page routes including the new `/town-office/reports` route for TownOfficeDashboardPage, wrapped in a shared Layout with Navigation and Footer.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component rendering brand info, a quick-links list (including the new 'Town Office Dashboard' link), contact details, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar for the Jackman, Maine town website with desktop and mobile menus, active link highlighting, and Internet Identity login/logout functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated identities, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flows, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping backend actor calls for events, contact info, user profiles, problem reports, and admin operations with appropriate cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind CSS base styles with a Northern Maine wilderness color palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying town history, quick facts, and descriptive content about Jackman, Maine with a logo and icon-based fact list.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact Us page for the Town of Jackman, displaying address, phone, and office hours fetched from the backend, along with a contact form that submits messages via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: Displays a list of town events fetched from the backend, with admin controls to add or delete events using Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the main landing page for Jackman, Maine, featuring a hero image, quick navigation links, activity highlights, and a hunting/fishing callout banner.
frontend/src/pages/LocalBusinessesPage.t: Displays static listings of local stores and hotels in Jackman, Maine, each shown as a card with name, description, address, phone, and hours.
frontend/src/pages/RecreationPage.tsx: Presents a static overview of recreational activities available in Jackman, Maine, including snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, paddling, camping, wildlife photography, and hunting, each with highlights.
frontend/src/pages/ReportProblemPage.tsx: A public-facing page where residents can submit infrastructure problem reports (potholes, streetlights, etc.) via a form, and admins can view and delete submitted reports.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: A static informational page listing Jackman town services (office, public works, library, etc.) and emergency contacts with hours and phone numbers.
frontend/src/pages/TownOfficeDashboardPa: An admin-only dashboard page that displays all submitted problem reports with delete functionality, showing an access-restricted message to unauthenticated or non-admin users.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (forest, slate, amber), typography/font families, container settings, and plugin integrations (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 17) for the Jackman, Maine town website, listing all existing features, requirements, architectural notes, and known issues.
